  return <><div className="markdown"><h2 id="-安装"><a aria-hidden="true" tabIndex="-1" href="#-安装"><span className="icon icon-link" /></a>{"⏬ 安装"}</h2><SourceCode lang="shell">{$$contentTexts[0].value}</SourceCode><h2 id="-使用"><a aria-hidden="true" tabIndex="-1" href="#-使用"><span className="icon icon-link" /></a>{"🌰 使用"}</h2><SourceCode lang="tsx">{$$contentTexts[1].value}</SourceCode><h2 id="-定制渲染器"><a aria-hidden="true" tabIndex="-1" href="#-定制渲染器"><span className="icon icon-link" /></a>{"🛠 定制渲染器"}</h2><p>{$$contentTexts[2].value}</p><SourceCode lang="tsx">{$$contentTexts[3].value}</SourceCode></div></>;

// export named function for fastRefresh
// ref: https://github.com/pmmmwh/react-refresh-webpack-plugin/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md#edits-always-lead-to-full-reload
function DumiMarkdownContent() {

  return <DumiPage><Suspense fallback={<LoadingComponent />}><DumiMarkdownInner /></Suspense></DumiPage>;
}

export default DumiMarkdownContent;
